title: Manufacturing Engineer - H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises:
H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises!
